decisions.decision: Test formatResolutionProbabilities indirectly through the resolved-market rendering path, not by exporting and testing it directly
alternatives_rejected: Export the private function and unit-test it directly

decisions.decision: Test the full two-step confirmation flow end-to-end (select outcome -> click Resolve -> assert confirmation UI -> click Yes, Resolve -> assert mutation called), plus Cancel and outcome-change-resets-confirming interactions
alternatives_rejected: Test each state in isolation via mock overrides without simulating user flow

decisions.decision: Test only the three guard conditions that exist in the component: resolved status (shows summary), non-active/closed status (returns null), no accountId (returns null). No role-based or ownership guards exist.
alternatives_rejected: Add tests for authorization/ownership checks that don't exist in the component

decisions.decision: Follow TradingPanel.test.tsx patterns exactly: vi.mock for hooks, vi.mocked for typed access, defaultMutationState helper, mockMutate spy, configuredSession/unconfiguredSession fixtures, renderWithProviders from helpers
alternatives_rejected: Use a different mocking approach or test runner

steps.task: Create frontend/src/__tests__/ResolveMarketPanel.test.tsx with mock setup: vi.mock useSession and useResolveMarket, create mockMutate spy, configuredSession/unconfiguredSession fixtures, defaultMutationState helper (typed to useResolveMarket return), mockMarket fixture with outcomes array, beforeEach to clearAllMocks and set defaults

Add guard clause tests: (1) resolved market with resolution string shows 'Resolved' and 'Outcome: <value>', (2) resolved market with resolutionProbabilities shows formatted distribution, (3) resolved market with neither shows 'Resolution finalized', (4) draft status market returns null (container not in document), (5) no accountId returns null

Add resolve form rendering test: active market with session shows 'Resolve Market' heading, select with 'Select winning outcome...' placeholder and outcome options, disabled Resolve button when no outcome selected

Add two-step confirmation flow tests: (1) select outcome + click Resolve shows confirmation text with outcome name and Yes/Resolve + Cancel buttons, (2) click Yes, Resolve calls mutation.mutate with { payload: { accountId, outcomeId }, session }, (3) click Cancel returns to initial resolve button state, (4) changing select while confirming resets back to resolve button
Add mutation state tests: (1) isPending disables Yes, Resolve button and shows 'Resolving...', (2) isError shows error message, (3) isSuccess shows 'Market resolved successfully.'
Run the test suite with 'cd frontend && npx vitest run src/__tests__/ResolveMarketPanel.test.tsx' and fix any failures
